match.userMessage:
Camera opens with direct overhead flat-lay framing focused on her feet sinking into warm sand as a foamy wave breaks and rushes forward. The coral lipstick tube settles beside the embossed mark while foam swirls across the frame. Camera then slowly pulls upward and backward into a wide shoreline shot, capturing her silhouette receding toward the sunlit horizon. Wind moves loose fabric around her legs and gentle ripples spread across the water surface. The shot holds steady on the expansive golden horizon as her figure fades naturally into the distance.

[SCARLETT, playful declarative]: "Coral. Out now."

Ambient sounds: gentle ocean waves lapping shoreline with soft wind. wave breaking and foam rushing, light water ripple.
